description_long: This bungalow features a single-story rectangular structure with a flat, striped roof and a prominent front entrance. The exterior is clad in alternating light and medium brown horizontal stripes, giving it a modern yet cozy appearance. A small porch area is visible at the front, with a covered awning and a set of steps leading up to the main door. Adjacent to the building is a hexagonal swimming pool with a light blue interior, surrounded by a paved deck. The property is set on a rectangular base, simulating a yard or lot, with minimal landscaping details. Windows are present on the front and sides, arranged in a simple, functional pattern.
description: A single-story, striped bungalow with a flat roof, front porch, and adjacent hexagonal swimming pool on a rectangular lot. The exterior features light and medium brown stripes and simple window arrangements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, porch, and the hexagonal pool in the foreground.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the bungalow, the flat striped roof, and the pool to the left.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back wall, minimal windows, and the striped roof extending over the structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the pool on the right and a clear view of the building's side and roof.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
